tasks.label: copy-files-and-install
args: cp -r "${workspaceFolder}/live-translator-installer" "${workspaceFolder}/${input:experimentationFolder}/" && cd "${workspaceFolder}/${input:experimentationFolder}" && cp "./live-translator-installer/translator.dev.json" "./live-translator-installer/translator.json" && cp "./live-translator-installer/settings.dev.json" "./live-translator-installer/settings.json" && ./live-translator-installer/install; status=$?; rm -f "./live-translator-installer/translator.json" "./live-translator-installer/settings.json"; exit $status

Copy-Item .\live-translator-installer -Destination .\${input:experimentationFolder} -Recurse -Force; Set-Location -LiteralPath .\${input:experimentationFolder}; Copy-Item .\live-translator-installer\translator.dev.json .\live-translator-installer\translator.json -Force; Copy-Item .\live-translator-installer\settings.dev.json .\live-translator-installer\settings.json -Force; try { .\live-translator-installer\installer.ps1; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE } finally { Remove-Item .\live-translator-installer\translator.json, .\live-translator-installer\settings.json -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit $exitCode

inputs.description: Select which experimentation folder to prepare and launch with.
